title: varlink images
body:
implement varlink image functions for working with libpod with the exception of a
couple due to incompletions on the libpod side of things (build).

also, created a first pass at a libpodpy package which will stand as a client to
working with libpod's varlink methods using python.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Reviewers, please note a couple of things when reviewing this:
* no new unit or integration tests for varlink because @jwhonce has agreed to do that for me
* the libpodpy skeleton I added will be picked up by @jwhonce as part of the testing. he will likely alter names, etc as he does that inheritance.
Can you rename this directory  cmd/podman/ioprojectatomicpodman to varlink
You are creating a util.go next to a utils.go?  Why?
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 58cb8f7) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 6ac8a24) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

This LGTM once conflicts are resolved
